title: CraftShift – The SMP Modpack
description: Step into Craftshift, a bold reimagining of Minecraft where technology, magic, and mystery collide.
body:
![Image from the official CraftShift SMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/362b204a00971b895dcd797747f1f50360a18e92.png)
# Craftshift – Rebuilding Reality, One Block at a Time
Step into Craftshift, a bold reimagining of Minecraft where technology, magic, and mystery collide. Explore altered dimensions, uncover powerful new mechanics, conquer hostile mobs, and master a world teeming with quests, custom structures, and revamped terrain generation.

Whether you're automating massive factories, diving into deep dungeons, or uncovering secrets in newly-forged lands, Craftshift offers an ever-evolving adventure designed for explorers, builders, and tinkerers alike.

## Key Features:

⚙️ Powerful tech mods and automation

📜 Questlines to guide your journey

🌍 New biomes, structures, and dimensions

👾 Custom mobs and combat challenges

🧠 New mechanics and progression systems

🎒 Tons of new items, gear, and tools

Are you ready to shift the way you play Minecraft?
